rulings.Case Title: EVANS NATIONAL LEASING, INC. VS. KENDRA TOMCIK DR et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Special Interrogatories, Set One Request For Production Of Documents, Set One And Form Interrogatories
rulings.Rulings: Matter on calendar for Wednesday November 24,2010, Line 6. DEFENDANT KENDRA TOMCIK, CONNIE TOMCIK's Motion To Compel Further Responses To Special Interrogatories, Set One Request For Production Of Documents, Set One And Form Interrogatories. The Court finds plaintiff's responses were timely and defendants' motion was timely. Motion granted in part and denied in part, request for sanctions denied. Motion denied as special interrogatories 5,6,7,8,9,12,14,15,17, and 27. Motion granted as to the following: Special interrogatories 10 and 11 (Plaintiff must identify in suffient detail the terms of the alleged assignment between ILS and plaintiff). Special interrogatory 16 (Plaintiff must stae the name, address, and telephone number of each individual known to it that participated in providing defendant with the spinal deompression table or any other services pursuant to the lease); Special interrogatory 28 (Plaintiffs objections are overruled); Form interrogatory 17.1 (Plaintiff must provide responses for request for admissions 5-7 if it has not already done so); and Requests for production of documents 6,7,and 8 (Plaintiff's objections are overruled and plaintiff must produce responsive documents.) Further responses are due fifteen days from notice of this order. = (302/CWW)
